title: EVA 04 explosion
wikitext:
[]: "EVA-04" explosion             Quote Post by Szmitten » Sat Jan 19, 2008 9:27 am Screencapped from preview. Note 1, either the explosion is lighting the red sea, or the sea is physically turning red. Note 2, rainbow above cross. Further note, is it me or is the epicentre of the explosion out to sea and not inland? EVA-04 explosion? Second Impact? Angel going boom? Inevitable off-topic talk of water colour to Red versus Blue (Water) please.

[]:             Quote Post by CtHuLhU » Sat Jan 19, 2008 10:22 am There are the cross and the rainbow we can also see on these screens. That had become an integral part of the new concept. What's interesting, shock wave's reflection on a surface of ocean... Nature of this phenomenon may be related to the appearance of a rainbow and its spectra.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Sat Jan 19, 2008 10:44 am I think that's just a reflection on the ocean.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sat Jan 19, 2008 8:45 pm It looks like a continental mass and the atmosphere above it turning red. The oceans, you can see, are already red in color.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jun 04, 2008 8:43 am Just FYI, the storyboards for the preview mention "Nevada" in this very cut (though I'm not sure what the whole sentence means, because I suck) , so I real -ly doubt they're lying about the Eva-04 thing.

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Wed Jun 04, 2008 9:46 am The Ocean is on the right part of the picture, so I don't understand where the big deal is.

Note 1, either the explosion is lighting the red sea, or the sea is physically turning red. Note 2, rainbow above cross. Further note, is it me or is the epicentre of the explosion out to sea and not inland? EVA-04 explosion? Second Impact? Angel going boom? Inevitable off-topic talk of water colour to Red versus Blue (Water) please.
